title: `VCD warning: $dumpvars: Package ($unit) is not dumpable with VCD` even if there are no declared items in $unit

features.name: dumpvars in SV2012 mode with logic type
features.description: Code should include a module with a logic variable and $dumpvars() call, compiled with -g2012 (SystemVerilog 2012) flag to trigger spurious $unit VCD warning
